channel.title: kelseycookcomedy | TikTok
channel.description: MARK YOUR TERRITORY out Feb 11 on Hulu & YouTube! Come see me on tour! Tix👇🏻🎫

item.title: Today’s the greatest because it’s AND my Happy Hour Tour starts! 🥜🥳 last year I outgrew my peanut allergy after not having them for 15 years and it’s truly been the greatest 😂 see you tonight + tomorrow Albuquerque, and see you next week Indianapolis!
item.description:
View on TikTok


Today’s the greatest because it’s AND my Happy Hour Tour starts! 🥜🥳 last year I outgrew my peanut allergy after not having them for 15 years and it’s truly been the greatest 😂 see you tonight + tomorrow Albuquerque, and see you next week Indianapolis!
#NationalPeanutButterDay #peanutbutter #allergy #podcast

item.title: WE’RE BACK!! Come see me on tour starting next week!! Tickets in my bioooo 🎫

View on TikTok


WE’RE BACK!! Come see me on tour starting next week!! Tickets in my bioooo 🎫
#comedy #standupcomedy #tour #sabrinacarpenter #happyhour

item.title: Not taking requests on this tour but come see my new material on the Happy Hour Tour 🍸

item.title: The loudest chewer in all the land 😬 new episode out now!

View on TikTok


The loudest chewer in all the land 😬 new episode out now!
@Chad Daniels #podcast #relationships #comedy #pickle

item.title: WHAT A YEAR 👏🏻 outgrowing my peanut allergy after 15 years might make 2024 my favorite one ever 😂🥜 thank you to everyone who came out to my tour shows this year, listened to our podcast, or watched my special. I’m so grateful and can’t wait to get this new tour kicked off in a few weeks!
item.description:
View on TikTok


WHAT A YEAR 👏🏻 outgrowing my peanut allergy after 15 years might make 2024 my favorite one ever 😂🥜 thank you to everyone who came out to my tour shows this year, listened to our podcast, or watched my special. I’m so grateful and can’t wait to get this new tour kicked off in a few weeks!
#2024 #Recap #2024Recap #Grateful

item.title: Merry Trumpet Tuesday! 🎺🎄 it’s been years since we did one of these! Thanks for leaving your song requests in the comments 🎶
item.description:
View on TikTok


Merry Trumpet Tuesday! 🎺🎄 it’s been years since we did one of these! Thanks for leaving your song requests in the comments 🎶
